output: Implemented the approved plan and captured execution evidence.
commands_run: pytest tests/test_payment_state_machine.py tests/test_solana_client.py tests/test_payment_race.py tests/test_payment_reconcile.py tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_safe_delete_messages.py tests/test_check_payment_invariants.py tests/test_tx_signature_history.py -x

task_updates.executor_notes: No additional schema work was needed in this rework pass. The existing migration remained consistent with the approved state and column expansion and was unaffected by the confirmation-overlap fix.
No DB-helper changes were needed in this rework pass. The overlap fix stayed within confirmation parsing and regression coverage, and the existing helper behavior remained valid.
No producer-flow changes were needed in this rework pass. ADMIN_DM authorization for admin-chat real payments remained intact while the classifier fix stayed isolated to recipient reply parsing.
No restart-filter changes were needed in this rework pass. The state-aware confirmation-view registration remained intact.

Made negative-phrase precedence explicit in `_classify_confirmation()` so embedded positive keywords do not override listed negative phrases. Verified with a throwaway repro that `not received` and `not received yet` now classify as negative on the first reply, while mixed text like `confirmed but not received` remains ambiguous.
No identity-router changes were needed in this rework pass. The admin path remains a strict author-identity branch with no `_is_directed_at_bot` or approved-member gate.
No pending-recipient dispatch changes were needed in this rework pass. `awaiting_admin_init` and the other non-routable states remain silent no-ops.
No test-success rewiring changes were needed in this rework pass. Test-payment success still parks the intent in `awaiting_test_receipt_confirmation` without creating the real payment inline.
No gate-helper changes were needed in this rework pass. The parser fix now feeds the existing negative escalation path correctly on the first `not received` reply.
No admin-approval UI changes were needed in this rework pass. `AdminApprovalView` and admin-DM fail-closed behavior remained intact.
No verified-wallet fast-path changes were needed in this rework pass. Single initiate still routes through `_gate_fresh_intent_atomic()` with no test payment.
No query-tool changes were needed in this rework pass. The overlap fix did not touch read-only admin tools.
No batch-initiate changes were needed in this rework pass. The single atomic intent insert contract remained intact.
No wallet-upsert changes were needed in this rework pass. Admin-only validation, verified_at preservation, and admin DM behavior remained intact.
No agent/tool-registration changes were needed in this rework pass. The existing admin-only tool wiring remained intact.
No orphan-sweep changes were needed in this rework pass. The periodic UI-cog reconciliation loop remained in place and the touched regression suite stayed green.
No stale-receipt sweep changes were needed in this rework pass. The 15-minute timeout escalation remained intact.
No `resolve_admin_intent` changes were needed in this rework pass. Cancel-only cascade behavior remained intact and unrelated to the classifier overlap fix.

Updated the regression coverage so it now enforces the intended overlap behavior instead of blessing it. The parser test asserts `not received` and a nearby negative variant are `negative`, and the state-machine test still proves the first such reply escalates immediately to `manual_review` with no ambiguous-count increment.

Revalidated after the overlap fix: the exact repro script passed, `tests/test_admin_payments.py -x` passed with 47 tests, the required focused trio passed with 72 tests, the listed invariant modules passed with 55 tests, and full `pytest` passed with 191 tests. The throwaway repro script was deleted after the successful run.
commands_run: pytest tests/test_payment_state_machine.py tests/test_solana_client.py tests/test_payment_race.py tests/test_payment_reconcile.py tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_safe_delete_messages.py tests/test_check_payment_invariants.py tests/test_tx_signature_history.py -x

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed unchanged schema evidence remains intact; this pass did not alter the migration or the unique partial index.
Confirmed unchanged DB-helper behavior remains intact; this pass did not alter batch insert or stale-awaiting-admin-init helpers.
Confirmed unchanged producer-flow authorization remains intact; this pass did not alter admin_chat real-payment confirmation actors.
Confirmed unchanged state-aware restart filtering remains intact after the classifier/test fix.

Confirmed `_classify_confirmation()` still uses whole-word matching plus the 👍 substring fallback, and now gives matched negative phrases precedence so `not received` and `not received yet` classify as negative instead of ambiguous.
Confirmed unchanged identity-router behavior remains intact; this pass did not alter `on_message` routing.
Confirmed unchanged pending-recipient dispatch still silently ignores `awaiting_admin_init`, and that coverage remains in the test module.
Confirmed unchanged test-success rewiring remains intact; this pass did not alter `handle_payment_result`.
Confirmed unchanged gate-helper ordering remains intact; this pass did not alter `_gate_existing_intent` or `_gate_fresh_intent_atomic`.
Confirmed unchanged AdminApprovalView/admin-DM behavior remains intact; this pass did not alter payment UI code.
Confirmed unchanged verified-wallet single-initiate fast path remains intact; this pass did not alter `execute_initiate_payment`.
Confirmed unchanged read-only query tool behavior remains intact; this pass did not alter tool executors, wallet redaction, or injection guards.
Confirmed unchanged batch atomicity and fan-out behavior remain intact; this pass did not alter `initiate_batch_payment`.
Confirmed unchanged wallet-upsert admin and validation behavior remains intact; this pass did not alter `upsert_wallet_for_user`.
Confirmed unchanged admin-only tool registration and identity injection remain intact; this pass did not alter agent/tool registration.
Confirmed unchanged PaymentUICog orphan-sweep ownership and 5-minute loop remain intact; this pass did not alter split-cog recovery code.
Confirmed unchanged 15-minute stale receipt sweep remains intact; this pass did not alter the timeout loop.
Confirmed unchanged `resolve_admin_intent` cancel-only cascade behavior remains intact; this pass did not alter the tool.
Confirmed the regression coverage now enforces the intended negative behavior for `not received` instead of blessing ambiguity, while the broader T19 refactor coverage remains intact.

Confirmed the focused trio passed with `-x`, the listed invariant modules stayed green, the throwaway overlap repro script passed and was deleted, and full `pytest` passed with no skipped or xfailed tests.
